sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.8.19: Move MotoPress Sync tab to first spot in Settings.
  • 1.8.8.18: Add search and pagination to bookings and guests.
  • 1.8.8.17: Move MotoPress Sync to Settings tab and make it default tab.
  • 1.8.8.16: Add MotoPress Sync settings tab with API key storage and test connection.
  • 1.8.8.15: Restore status selector in the calendar quick edit popup.
  • 1.8.8.14: Add export type dropdown and CSV export option.
  • 1.8.8.13: Hide Add Booking from menu and add Export tab in Settings.
